overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a cinematic video game (Alan Wake 2) showing an FBI agent exploring a classic American diner. The character walks through the interior with warm sunlight streaming through windows, passes patrons in red vinyl booths, and interacts with a man at a back table before returning toward the counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: diner booth area near front windows

events.description: character stops briefly at the window table then turns to walk deeper into the diner
moving from bright sunlit window area into dimmer interior space

agents.ego_description: approaches a man eating at a window booth, pauses briefly, then turns to walk toward the back of the diner

notable_agents.action: man eating from a bowl at a table near the window, illuminated by sunlight

entered.detail: classic diner booths with red upholstery and wooden trim
large windows showing street outside with parked white van
black and white checkered floor pattern visible in background
curved wooden counter with red stools in the background
ketchup and mustard bottles on the table

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit corner of a classic American diner. The FBI character approaches a man eating at a booth near the window, where warm morning light streams in. After a brief pause, the character turns and walks away from the window, moving deeper into the establishment as the lighting transitions from bright natural light to dimmer interior ambiance.

scene_state.functional_zone: main diner walkway between booths and counter

events.description: passing by structural columns that briefly obscure the view of the counter
character turns slightly left while walking past the counter area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the central aisle of the diner, passing by the counter area and other seated patrons

notable_agents.action: man in green cap sitting at the counter facing away from camera

entered.detail: chalkboard menu with prices and daily specials above the counter
industrial style black pendant lights hanging from ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the main body of the diner, passing the curved wooden counter on the left where a man sits on a red stool. The space features hanging industrial lights and a menu chalkboard. The lighting becomes progressively dimmer as the character moves away from the front windows toward the back of the restaurant.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corner booth area with dim lighting and wood-paneled walls

events.description: entering darker back corner of diner with wood-paneled walls and minimal natural light
character approaches table and interacts with seated man, examining items on the table

agents.ego_description: approaches a bald man sitting alone at a back table and engages in close examination of objects on the table

notable_agents.action: bald man in purple shirt examining small objects and papers spread on the table

entered.detail: old CRT television mounted on the wood-paneled wall displaying static or dim image
framed pictures and notices on the dark wood-paneled walls

segments.scene_description: In the dimly lit back corner of the diner, the character approaches a solitary bald man seated at a booth. The area features wood-paneled walls adorned with framed pictures and a wall-mounted television. The character stops at the table and appears to examine items laid out on the green marble surface while the man gestures toward the objects.

scene_state.functional_zone: counter area with neon signage and service station

events.description: character turns away from the table and begins walking back toward the counter
moving back toward area with more natural light from windows

agents.ego_description: turns away from the back table and walks back toward the counter area, passing a man in a red plaid shirt

notable_agents.action: man in red plaid shirt sitting at the counter with a drink

entered.detail: red neon Coca-Cola sign mounted on the wall above the counter

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the back table and returns toward the main counter area, passing by a man in a red plaid shirt seated at the bar. The neon Coca-Cola sign becomes visible above the counter as the character approaches the service area, with natural light from the front windows gradually becoming visible again in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a classic American diner that shifts from bright morning sunlight into a dim interior before returning toward the light. It begins in a sunlit corner where the FBI character approaches a man at a window booth, then turns and moves deeper into the establishment as the lighting transitions from bright natural light to a dimmer interior ambiance. The camera follows the character past a curved wooden counter and industrial hanging lights, with the environment becoming progressively darker as they move toward the back of the restaurant. The scene then settles in a dimly lit back corner featuring wood-paneled walls and a green marble table, where the character pauses to examine items with a solitary man. Finally, the character leaves the back table and returns toward the main counter, passing a neon Coca-Cola sign as the natural light from the front windows gradually reappears in the background.
